muxt generate --use-receiver-type=Server
muxt check

exec go test -race -count=1

-- template.gohtml --
{{- define "POST /add Add(ctx, unmarshalJSON(body))" -}}{{- .Result -}}{{- end -}}
-- go.mod --
module server

go 1.25
-- server.go --
package server

import (
	"context"
	"embed"
	"html/template"
	"strconv"
)

//go:embed *.gohtml
var templatesFS embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(templatesFS, "*"))

type Server struct{}

type Pair struct {
	A int `json:"a"`
	B int `json:"b"`
}

func (Server) Add(ctx context.Context, in Pair) string { return strconv.Itoa(in.A + in.B) }
-- server_test.go --
package server

import (
	"net/http"
	"net/http/httptest"
	"strings"
	"testing"
)

func TestBadBody(t *testing.T) {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	TemplateRoutes(mux, Server{})
	req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodPost, "/add", strings.NewReader("{not json"))
	rec := httptest.NewRecorder()
	mux.ServeHTTP(rec, req)
	if rec.Code != http.StatusBadRequest {
		t.Fatalf("status = %d, want 400", rec.Code)
	}
	// On a JSON decode failure the receiver method is not called, so no result
	// is rendered.
	if got := rec.Body.String(); got != "" {
		t.Fatalf("body = %q, want empty", got)
	}
}
